title: Can the Table of Contents in a Monday doc be made wider
excerpt: Can the Table of Contents in Monday Docs be widened to make more words visible.

posts.author: SThakkar1 (Subash Thakkar)
posts.cookedHtml: Can the Table of Contents in Monday Docs be widened to make more words visible.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @SThakkar1,

Great question! We will relay this to our internal team and get back to you with any updates once they reply

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Just an update - the team has confirmed that at this time, I am afraid there is no way expand the view. That said, they are definitely considering this suggestion and will provide continue to provide updates. Thanks in advance for your understanding!

posts.author: MarkAlbis (Mark Albis)
posts.cookedHtml: Reviving an old topic but has there been any further consideration of this feature? It would be very helpful for scanning extensive requirements documents with long and numerous headings.
